do_if.value: not $stationId? or $stationId == '' or not $leftShip? or not $leftShip.exists or not $rightShip? or not $rightShip.exists
not $stationId? or $stationId == '' or not $ship? or not $ship.exists

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PE session closed key=' + $sessionKey + ' reason=' + (if $reason != '' then $reason else 'none')
'[GT Redistribute] AssignDockOrders skipped: station slot race left=' + $leftId + '@' + $leftStationId + ' right=' + $rightId + '@' + $rightStationId
'[GT Redistribute] Skipping dock order for left=' + $leftId + ' (already active/queued)'
'[GT Redistribute] Skipping dock order for right=' + $rightId + ' (already active/queued)'

'[GT Redistribute] Assigned DockAndPilotExchange left=' + $leftId + '@' + $leftStationId + ' sector=' + (if $leftStation.sector? then $leftStation.sector.knownname else 'UNKNOWN') + ' right=' + $rightId + '@' + $rightStationId + ' sector=' + (if $rightStation.sector? then $rightStation.sector.knownname else 'UNKNOWN') + ' leftNeedsOrder=' + $leftNeedsOrder + ' rightNeedsOrder=' + $rightNeedsOrder + ' immediate=' + $immediate

'[GT Redistribute] AssignDockOrders failed: no available dock station left=' + $leftId + ' right=' + $rightId + ' leftSector=' + (if $leftShip.sector? then $leftShip.sector.knownname else 'UNKNOWN') + ' rightSector=' + (if $rightShip.sector? then $rightShip.sector.knownname else 'UNKNOWN')

raise_lua_event.name: 'gt.executePilotSwap'
raise_lua_event.param: global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$left + '|' + global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$right + '|' + (if global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$leftUid? then global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$leftUid else '') + '|' + (if global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$rightUid? then global.$GT_PilotExchangeSessions.{'$' + $sessionKey}.$rightUid else '')

do_if.value: global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.keys? and global.$GT_Ships.keys.count gt 0

$ship? and $ship.exists and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange and md.GT_Ship_State_Utilities.GT_ReconcilePilotExchangeState?

$ship? and $ship.exists and $ship.isclass.ship and $ship.owner == faction.player and md.GT_Ship_State_Utilities.GT_ReconcilePilotExchangeState? and global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange

$ship? and $ship.exists and $ship.isclass.ship and $ship.owner == faction.player and md.GT_Ship_State_Utilities.GT_ReconcilePilotExchangeState? and global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange

debug_text.text: '[GT Redistribute] PostSwapNameRefresh received left=' + $p.$left + ' right=' + $p.$right + ' attempt=' + $attempt

set_value.name: $leftPilot
set_value.exact: if $leftShip? and $leftShip.exists and $leftShip.pilot? and $leftShip.pilot.exists then $leftShip.pilot else null

set_value.name: $rightPilot
set_value.exact: if $rightShip? and $rightShip.exists and $rightShip.pilot? and $rightShip.pilot.exists then $rightShip.pilot else null
